data.body: Shipped: rebar jira-onboard intercept (src/rebar/_cli/_jira_onboard.py, 196 LOC) mirroring the rebar llm precedent; detect (in-process resolver mirroring resolve_jira_settings precedence) -> prompt missing url/user/project -> persist via new config.write_jira_config (parse-tomllib/mutate/re-emit, atomic, fail-closed, NEVER edits a user pyproject, NEVER writes the token) -> bridge-probe with resolved settings injected via new _bridge_probe(extra_env=...). Flags: --url/--user/--project, --no-validate, --reset/--yes, --help. ADR 0007 records the never-touch-pyproject + stdlib-only decisions. Docs: docs/jira-sync-setup.md §2 cross-references the wizard. Verification: 19 new tests in tests/unit/test_jira_onboard.py PASS; full cli/config/jira suite (414) PASS; make lint PASS; live CLI smoke confirmed detect+persist+env-bridged probe end to end. Plan review passed after 4 iterations (remediated 2 BLOCKs: config-write mechanism + bridge-probe env gap, then the section-boundary BLOCK by eliminating line-splicing).
